candidate.description: Data structures accelerating lookups in databases: B-trees, hash, GIN, GiST, with tradeoffs in write amplification and space.

l2s.scope_1line: Planner decision of which index (if any) to use for a query.
Indexes that include all columns needed by a query, avoiding heap lookups.

l1s.scope_1line: Data structures accelerating data retrieval (B-tree, hash, GIN, GiST).
Planner and cost-based rewriting of queries for efficient execution.
